rationale: Rate and cash-proxy data can test whether TECL should stand down when cash strength beats risk-asset recovery.
expected_failure_mode: fails Gold all-era economics or Future Confidence before promotion
stop_conditions: simple family fails the named-window or parsimony gates
candidate family remains crowded or redundant
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
cash-relative signal is too defensive in 2020 or 2023 rebound
candidate fails to add independence from Gold anchor states
